title: Add user profile display and replace logo with uploaded image

requirements.text: Display authenticated user's profile information (name, email, college) in the app header or navigation area, accessible after login
acceptanceCriteria: User profile information is visible after successful Internet Identity login
Profile displays user's name, email, and college from the backend userProfile data
Profile is accessible from the main navigation or header area
Profile display works on both desktop and mobile layouts

requirements.text: Replace the placeholder Student Vibe logo with the uploaded tech head circuit brain logo image (Screenshot_20250223_215353_Chrome.jpg) in the app header, splash screen, and any other logo locations
acceptanceCriteria: The tech head circuit brain logo replaces the current text-based 'Student Vibe' logo in the header
The logo appears in the SplashScreen component animation
Logo maintains proper dimensions and aspect ratio across all screen sizes
Logo is clearly visible against the dark background theme

constraints: Do not modify useInternetIdentity.ts, useInternetIdentity.tsx, useActor.ts, main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui directory
Maintain the existing single-actor backend architecture
nonGoals: Creating a new profile editing interface or profile page
Adding new profile fields beyond what exists in the backend
Modifying the authentication flow or Internet Identity integration

required: Tech head profile circuit brain logo with cyan to blue gradient on dark navy background, vector style illustration showing a human head silhouette with connected circuit nodes (logo.dim_400x400.png)
